label: sandbox_diagnostics • node -e parse error surfaces the write-file escape hint
notes: The Node sibling of inline-code-multiline-c: a multi-line script wedged into `node -e "…"` whose escaping broke produces a JS SyntaxError. The self-heal hint must recognize the interpreter `-e` inline-code flag and steer the model to sandbox_write_file instead of re-escaping.
